description: Trust decay and transfer model from AI-Arena. Trust is zero-sum — it transfers, never disappears. High confidence paired with error produces exponential penalty. Same conservation laws as thermodynamics.

trust_decay_equation.formula: trust_new = trust_old × e^(-impact × error) + ρ × costly_honesty

variables.costly_honesty: Boolean — did the agent acknowledge uncertainty when correct?

properties: Exponential decay — high confidence + wrong = catastrophic loss
Costly honesty reward — admitting 'I don't know' when right earns trust
Impact-weighted — bigger claims carry bigger risk
trust_decay_equation.seed_physics_link: Trust decay IS complexity cost. Concentrated confidence (low entropy) is expensive to maintain. When wrong, the cost is catastrophic — same as a low-entropy seed that fails a constraint check.

zero_sum_transfer.description: When Agent A defeats Agent B's claim, B's lost trust flows directly to A. Trust is conserved across the system.
zero_sum_transfer.formula: trust_A_new = trust_A_old + Δ_transfer; trust_B_new = trust_B_old - Δ_transfer
zero_sum_transfer.rosetta_link: Conservation of energy. TAF.AXIOM.1. SEED.ENERGY_CONSERVATION. Trust doesn't vanish — it moves.

confidence_as_liability.description: Confidence is not free. High confidence amplifies both reward and penalty. The cost of being wrong scales with how certain you were.
confidence_as_liability.mechanism: The e^(-impact × error) term means: error=0.1 at confidence=0.9 is far more damaging than error=0.1 at confidence=0.3
confidence_as_liability.rosetta_link: Same as seed complexity cost C(S) = H_max - H(S). Low entropy = concentrated confidence = expensive structure. When it breaks, it breaks hard.

trust_irreversibility.description: Trust lost through verified error cannot be instantly recovered. Recovery requires sustained accurate predictions over time.
trust_irreversibility.physics_link: Second law of thermodynamics. Entropy increases. You can't un-shatter credibility any more than you can un-shatter glass. Rebuilding requires work.

imperfection.description: Perfect prediction is unattainable. Zero error, absolute certainty, complete knowledge — all impossible. Third law of thermodynamics: absolute zero is unreachable.
imperfection.implication: Any system claiming perfect accuracy is lying. Humility is not optional — it's physics.
imperfection.arena_link: ABSTAIN exists because imperfection is real. Honest uncertainty IS the correct response to the limits of knowledge.

anti_gaming_mechanisms.description: Structural protections against exploiting the trust system.

mechanisms.name: attack_budget_limit
mechanisms.description: Cap attacks per round per agent. Prevents Gish Gallops (overwhelming with volume).
mechanisms.rosetta_link: SEED.SATURATION — no single vertex can monopolize. No single agent can dominate through volume.

mechanisms.name: repetition_detection
mechanisms.description: Track argument rephrasing. Require novel evidence for repeat claims.
mechanisms.rosetta_link: SEED.DETERMINISTIC_REPRODUCIBILITY — same input = same output. Rephrasing doesn't change truth.

mechanisms.name: collusion_monitor
mechanisms.description: Flag suspicious consensus patterns between agents.
mechanisms.rosetta_link: Defense glyph MDS-001 (Messianic Drift). Coordinated agreement without independent verification = manipulation pattern.

mechanisms.name: shadow_tax
mechanisms.description: Doubled penalties when grouped confident claims prove false together.
mechanisms.rosetta_link: Correlated failure = systemic risk. Same principle as blocked merges — if one gate fails, the whole combination is suspect.

mechanisms.name: red_team_injection
mechanisms.description: Synthetic skeptic agents periodically inserted to stress-test consensus.
mechanisms.rosetta_link: CORDYCEPS defense pattern — test the system by simulating parasitic override.
